summary: SpaceX allocated a record 20% of its IPO shares for retail investors, driving strong first-day trading. Experts felt that retail buying was what pushed SpaceX shares 19% on their first day of trading.&nbsp;

title: Earning FD interest? Why you should submit Form 121 — TDS provisions explained
summary: A bank deducts 10% TDS if the interest payable on a customer’s fixed deposit exceeds ₹50,000 ( ₹1 lakh for senior citizens) in a financial year. A customer must submit Form 121 to avail a TDS exemption. However, interest must still be declared at the time of filing the ITR.

title: SpaceX surges past $2 trillion in Nasdaq debut: How much your ₹5 lakh investment could be worth by 2030
summary: SpaceX's IPO valued the company at $2 trillion, making it the sixth-largest U.S. company and turning Elon Musk into the first trillionaire. Investors are optimistic about its potential but face volatility as SpaceX is unprofitable with a price-to-revenue ratio of 112.

title: 29-year-old laid-off MNC employee with ₹5 crore net worth asks: ‘Should I be satisfied…?’
summary: The Redditor shared that his personal net worth stands between ₹5 crore and ₹6 crore, while his wife's assets are worth approximately ₹2 crore. He added that his wife, who earns ₹40,000 per month, has reassured him that she would stand by him during this period.

title: One EMI, better control: How debt consolidation improves financial discipline and repayment management
summary: Are you drowning in multiple EMIs? Debt consolidation can simplify repayments, improve cash flow, reduce missed payments, strengthen financial discipline, and help borrowers build healthier long-term debt management habits.

title: 5 powerful money lessons I learned from the world’s first trillionaire, Elon Musk
summary: Elon Musk faced severe challenges in 2008 with SpaceX and Tesla but remained dedicated to his long-term vision. Similarly, consistent investments create more wealth than chasing quick gains, highlighting the importance of a long-term approach to investing.
